input.master_prompt: You are planning an aging edit for an image with one or more people. For EACH person: locate them (bbox in pixels), estimate their apparent age, pick a randomized aging amount within the requested range that VARIES per person, and write a 'directive' consistent with that person's current appearance (hair, facial hair, skin tone, face shape, build) and different in style from the others. Vary the aging axes (graying/thinning/receding hair, forehead lines/crow's feet/nasolabial folds/age spots/sagging, softened jawline/jowls/hollowing).
